summary: Immediate breast reconstruction does not compromise the delivery of adjuvant chemotherapy; studies show no interference with chemo timelines or efficacy despite concerns about radiotherapy outcomes unrelated to treatment sequencing. The primary impact lies in post-radiation complications such as infections and implant failure—issues distinct from chemotherapy administration.\boxed{B}

The primary impact lies in post-radiation complications such as infections and implant failure—issues distinct from chemotherapy administration.\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
